_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. Type "echo: Visit https://example.com" into the message input (data-testid "message-input") and click the send button (data-testid "send-button"). Wait for the user message to render. Within the user message (".message-user") there should be exactly one anchor with class "text-link" (selector ".message-user a.text-link") whose href is "https://example.com".
